properties.text:
FOLLOWERS - COMMON BELIEVERS. THEY GENERATE FAITH AND REPRODUCE WHEN HAPPY.

SKEPTICS - THEY DOUBT. THEY LOWER FAITH AND INFLUENCE NEARBY FOLLOWERS.

FANATICS - THEY APPEAR WHEN FAITH IS HIGH. THEY CHASE AND KILL.

FAITH:
0-49    SKEPTICISM  (SKEPTICS SPREAD)
50-70   BALANCE     (EVOLUTION ONLY HERE)
71-100  FANATICISM  (FANATICS APPEAR)
